name: 10-Day Tour: Grand Tour of Morocco from Casablanca

seo.title: 10-Day Grand Tour of Morocco — Casablanca, Chefchaouen, Fes, Sahara, Marrakech | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 10-day Morocco tour from Casablanca: Rabat, Chefchaouen, Tangier, Fes (with guide), Meknes, Volubilis, Merzouga Sahara, Todra, Dades, Ait Ben Haddou, Marrakech (with guide).

hero.tagline: The grand tour of Morocco in 10 days — from Casablanca to Marrakech

intro: This grand 10-day tour from Casablanca is the most complete itinerary in our range. It crosses the whole of Morocco from north to south: Rabat, Chefchaouen, Tangier, Meknes, Volubilis, Fes with an official guide, the Merzouga desert, the Todra Gorges, the Dades Valley, Ouarzazate, Ait Ben Haddou and Marrakech with an official guide. Two certified local guides included.
